guildOnly: 🖋 This quill only scribbles in servers, not DMs.
🖋 Server only. My ledger doesn’t travel by private courier.
🖋 Not here. Try me in a server where the records belong.
roleMissing: 🖋 I can’t find the DM role **{role}**. Create it first, then we’ll ink the roster.
🖋 Role missing: **{role}**. No role, no tidy list.
🖋 The DM role **{role}** doesn’t exist. Please file it into existence.

title: __Available DMs__
Quil’s Roster: DMs on Deck
DM Ledger — Current Volunteers
empty: Sorry, kiddo. Sometimes the internet is like real life and no one wants to DM.
No one’s flagged as available. The quill waits… impatiently.
Blank page. No DMs listed at the moment.
Roster’s quiet. Try again later or bribe someone with snacks.

notAllowed: 🖋 You don’t have permission to toggle DM availability.
🖋 That switch isn’t for you. Ask Staff or a GM.
🖋 Closed drawer. Only Staff/GMs can flip this one.
enabled: {user} is now available to DM. I’ve noted it neatly.
{user} flagged as **Available to DM**. The ledger approves.
Marked {user} as available. May their prep be short and their players punctual.
disabled: {user} is no longer available to DM. Ink crossed through—politely.
Removed **Available to DM** from {user}. Back to lurking, then.
Unmarked {user}. Their page returns to the calm margins.
